description: Lily Liu, president of the Solana Foundation, shares her journey into the crypto space, discussing her background in finance and her transition to blockchain technology. She reflects on her experiences in traditional finance, her introduction to Bitcoin through Bobby Lee, and her eventual involvement with Solana. Liu emphasizes the revolutionary aspects of decentralized networks and their impact on economic and governance models.
topic_summary: Lily Liu discusses her career path from traditional finance to the crypto space, her insights on Bitcoin, and the transformative potential of decentralized systems [t=0:24 - t=267:55].
